routes.documentation: Production Level eKYC NID Text Extraction API Simulation

responses.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "status_code": 4001,
  "mobile_no": "{{any (body 'mobile_no') (queryParam 'mobile_no') default='01770004001'}}",
  "reference_id": "{{any (body 'reference_id') (queryParam 'reference_id') default='a8f87140-6975-488f-9855-cdbacf833548'}}",
  "data": {
    "nid_no": "3290149669",
    "dob": "27/Dec/1987",
    "applicant_name_ben": "পীযুষ রায়",
    "applicant_name_eng": "PIJUSH ROY",
    "father_name": "িচত্র জন রায়",
    "mother_name": "কল্প না রায়",
    "spouse_name": "none",
    "address": "দওেভাগ,নারায়ণগঞ্জ - ১৮০০, নারায়ণগঞ্জ সদর, নারায়ণগঞ্জ ",
    "post_code": "1800",
    "blood_group": null,
    "birth_place": "NARAYANGANJ"
  }
}
responses.label: Success Response (4001)
